message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle rectangle

class ClassPathXmlApplicationContext {
    "refresh() Spring加载的入口"
    "finishBeanFactoryInitialization() - spring bean 实例化入口"
    "preInstantiateSingletons"
}

class AbstractApplicationContext {
    "refresh() Spring加载的入口"
    "finishBeanFactoryInitialization() - spring bean 实例化入口"
    "preInstantiateSingletons"
}

class DefaultListableBeanFactory {
    "getBean()真正获取bean的开始doXXX,是Spring通用的实现方法命名方式"
}

    "doGetBean 真正获取bean的开始doXXX,是Spring通用的实现方法命名方式"
